body:
Bugfixes: * Fixes image rendering being wiped quickly (#2374) * Regression from v2.64.0 * Fixes ASCII logo being overwritten in `--dynamic-interval` mode * Regression from v2.64.0 * Internal fixes Logos: * Updates OpenWrt and adds a small variant (#2376) * The old one is renamed to `openwrt_old` ---
